content:
All the sudden signing that paper just ain’t as important.

F enters, freshened and unaware and ready to embark on the night’s ventures. To celebrate a friend’s pregnancy.

J excuses himself and leaves.

2: guilt—

He can’t focus at work. And decides to confront F. He drafts a few letters, but can’t get the wording right.

D’s car breaks down, and she asks J for a ride.

J confesses what he found. D insists on reporting the secret to the police.

J buys some time. He intends on confronting F. And then the police. But F first.

He doesn’t confront F though. And lies to D that he does.

3: fallout —

Bonfire party—
context: From document: A friend shares a dark secret with another friend; or, one night before… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/2)
